archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Dark Tech-Bro with Purple Accent)
rationale: The design strictly follows the user's request for a 'Render.com backend hosting' visual theme. This requires a dark-first, premium developer-tool aesthetic: deep slate/black backgrounds, crisp sans-serif typography (Satoshi), structural grid-based layouts, and a signature vibrant violet/purple accent for primary actions and glowing focal points. We avoid heavy gradients in favor of restrained glows, 1px subtle borders, and precise alignment.

spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
spacing_and_layout.grid_icon_gallery: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 md:grid-cols-6 lg:grid-cols-8 gap-px bg-zinc-800/50 p-px rounded-xl overflow-hidden

surface_styles.header: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-[#09090b]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5
surface_styles.icon_card: bg-[#121214] flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 aspect-square hover:bg-[#18181b] transition-colors duration-200 group cursor-pointer relative
surface_styles.code_block: bg-[#0d0d12] border border-white/10 rounded-lg p-4 font-mono text-sm overflow-x-auto
surface_styles.primary_button: bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-700 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(139,92,246,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(139,92,246,0.5)]

icon_gallery.strategy: Avoid standard gap-based grids. Use a 1px border-collapse style. Container has a dark border background (`bg-zinc-800`), and children have solid background (`bg-zinc-950`). This creates a precise 1px tech grid that feels like a developer tool.
icon_gallery.layout: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 md:grid-cols-6 lg:grid-cols-8 gap-px bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl overflow-hidden

icon_detail_modal.strategy: Shadcn Dialog component, heavy customization. Split layout: left side shows the massive icon with live animation trigger, right side shows controls (Sliders for size, stroke, speed) and code preview block.
icon_detail_modal.styles: Dark background `#121214`, subtle border `#27272a`. Close button must be distinct.

playground.strategy: Split screen layout `grid md:grid-cols-2`. Left panel: Interactive controls using customized Shadcn Sliders and Selects. Right panel: Live rendered icon and instantly updating syntax-highlighted code block.
playground.styles: Use monospace fonts heavily here. Make it look like a sleek IDE.

hero_background.description: Dark background with a subtle purple geometric design, used at low opacity (10-15%) with a radial mask to create depth behind the hero text.

icons_library.recommendation: Use `lucide-react` for standard static representation. For the core value prop (animated icons), the agent should implement custom Framer Motion variants on SVG paths, demonstrating hover/tap/loop interactions.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for baseline icons.
Install 'framer-motion' for all icon animations and page transitions.
Implement the layout with strict adherence to the tech-bro grid aesthetic: heavy use of 1px borders, subtle dark mode colors (#09090b, #121214), and exact purple accents (#8B5CF6).
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='icon-search-input'`).
The Hero section should feature an interactive grid of icons that animate automatically or on hover, showcasing the library's capability immediately.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the main page layout, but heavily customize Shadcn components (Dialog, Slider, Select, Tabs) for the interactive Modal and Playground.
